primary_colors: warm earth tones, terracotta, caramel brown, warm beige, sand
design_context.lighting_mood: moody dramatic lighting, deep shadows, intimate atmosphere, accent spotlights, rich dark tones
design_context.overall_description: Warm Earth color palette. Dark & Moody atmosphere.

0033443f-92f4-44e2-8a11-d907c7f98fe0.generated_prompt: A master bedroom, 3D interior visualization render, captured from a cinematic camera perspective, showcasing a low-slung, upholstered platform against the far 4.0m wall, flanked by contemporary polished concrete nightstands. The dramatic lighting emanates from recessed linear LED channels running along the perimeter of the coffered ceiling, casting long, soft shadows and creating deep, intimate pockets of darkness against the warm beige walls. The main wall behind the platform features a seamless paneling system in a matte caramel brown, subtly enhancing the room's warmth. The floor is covered in large format, honed terracotta porcelain tiles, reflecting the diffuse ambient light with a soft sheen. To the right, a freestanding wardrobe with smoked glass doors and blackened steel frames stands elegantly, its contents subtly obscured. Opposite the platform, along the 5.0m wall, a minimalist dresser in sand-colored lacquered wood is positioned beneath a large, circular polished brass mirror with a slim profile. A sleek low-back armchair upholstered in a deep cocoa velvet rests in the corner near a tall, open-shelved bookshelf crafted from blackened steel and warm walnut, filled with carefully curated art books, with a lush, potted plant situated on the top shelf, adding a touch of natural vibrancy. Additionally, a large, well-placed floor plant in a textured ceramic pot adds organic softness to the corner next to the wardrobe. Global illumination is meticulously rendered, bringing out the clean geometry and precise textures of every element, from the crisp linen bedding in muted tones to the smooth, glossy surfaces of the furniture. Volumetric lighting subtly highlights dust motes in the air, adding to the realistic, moody atmosphere, all rendered with expert precision and professional-grade quality.
modification_history: Remove the following from the room: King Bed. Keep everything else the same.
Remove the following from the room: King Bed. Keep everything else the same.
Add the following to the room: Plants. Keep everything else the same.

71be2334-5225-4868-bc8b-fadf3c9131f2.generated_prompt: A cinematic 3D interior visualization render captures a luxurious modern master bathroom, bathed in moody dramatic lighting that emphasizes deep shadows and an intimate atmosphere, with accent spotlights strategically illuminating architectural features. The pristine 3.0m x 3.5m space features walls clad in large format, matte caramel brown porcelain tiles, complemented by a smooth, polished light beige concrete floor that reflects the subtle volumetric lighting. A freestanding, minimalist white Kaldewei Incava bathtub is positioned diagonally in the far corner, its pure form contrasting beautifully with the warm earth tones of the room. Above the tub, a single, recessed circular LED downlight casts a focused glow. To the left, a floating vanity crafted from solid European walnut timber, featuring integrated handles and a seamless quartz countertop in a warm sand hue, supports two rectangular white ceramic vessel sinks with Dornbracht Tara Logic single-lever basin mixers in a brushed brass finish. A vast, floor-to-ceiling mirror with a thin, matte black steel frame is mounted above the vanity, reflecting the deep shadows and contributing to the room's expansive feel. To the right, a frameless, clear tempered glass shower enclosure with minimalist brushed brass hardware encloses a walk-in shower area lined with vertically stacked, textured terracotta ceramic tiles, featuring a recessed niche for toiletries. A sleek, wall-mounted brushed brass towel rack holds soft, sand-colored linen towels. Architectural details include sharp, clean lines throughout, with a simple, unframed architrave defining the doorway. The ceiling is a smooth, unadorned plaster in a warm beige, reflecting the rich, dark tones of the overall palette. A small, potted Sansevieria trifasciata plant on the vanity adds a subtle touch of green, further enhancing the warm earth-toned palette. The entire scene is rendered with photorealistic precision, showcasing clean geometry, exquisitely detailed textures, and soft, realistic global illumination and ambient occlusion, resulting in a high-end 3D architectural rendering that exudes modern elegance and a tranquil, sophisticated ambiance.

fa096fcb-fc60-4c47-a13d-7d5da98e1830.generated_prompt: A cinematic 3D interior visualization render captures a modern child's bedroom bathed in moody, dramatic lighting, showcasing a warm earth tone palette of terracotta, caramel brown, warm beige, and sand, rendered with impeccable clean geometry and precise textures. The perspective is from a low angle, gazing towards a large casement window on the far wall, creating significant depth. A Queen-sized bed, upholstered in a velvety caramel brown fabric, rests centrally against the back wall, its headboard a sleek, geometric form. To the left, a built-in wardrobe with floor-to-ceiling sand-colored matte laminate doors integrates seamlessly into the wall, featuring subtle, integrated handle pulls. Adjacent to the wardrobe, a minimalist desk crafted from polished concrete with a clean, cantilevered design is positioned beneath the window, accompanied by a simple black steel-framed chair. Above the desk, a circular mirror with a thin matte black frame reflects the warm ambient light. A tall, open bookshelf crafted from powder-coated black steel and featuring terracotta-colored modular shelves stands against the right wall, displaying a carefully curated selection of children's books and a verdant Monstera Deliciosa plant in a smooth terracotta planter. The walls are finished in a smooth, warm beige plaster, contrasting subtly with a dark sand-colored micro-cement floor that extends throughout the room. Overhead, a precisely rendered coffered ceiling in a slightly darker warm beige contributes to the room's sculptural quality. Volumetric lighting streams in softly from the window, augmented by strategic, recessed LED accent spotlights in the ceiling, casting long, soft shadows and highlighting the rich, dark tones of the space. Global illumination and ambient occlusion are meticulously rendered, giving depth and realism to every surface, from the subtle sheen on the polished concrete desk to the matte finish of the wardrobe doors. The overall atmosphere is intimate and sophisticated, with every element meticulously designed within the modern, clean-lined aesthetic.

4a6638cd-d514-4ae4-8036-2540c1e3c529.generated_prompt: A professional 3D interior visualization render captures a modern kitchen, bathed in moody dramatic lighting that emphasizes deep shadows and an intimate atmosphere, with accent spotlights strategically placed. The cinematic camera perspective, low and wide, showcases the 4.0m x 5.0m space, focusing on a robust kitchen island centralized in the foreground. The island, a monolithic block of honed caramel brown travertine with subtle veining, extends 3 meters long, its waterfall edge facing the viewer. Three backless, sand-colored leather bar stools with slender, matte black steel frames are tucked neatly beneath the island's overhang. Against the far wall, a full-height pantry shelf unit crafted from vertically slatted dark oak stretches from floor to ceiling, its integrated warm LED strip lighting casting a soft glow on a collection of terracotta and beige ceramic dishes. Above the island, three minimalist pendant lights with spherical frosted glass diffusers, suspended at varying heights, emit a focused, warm glow, accentuating the polished concrete floor, which reflects the light with a subtle sheen. The walls are finished in a smooth, warm beige plaster, leading up to a clean, crisp white ceiling. A large, architectural window on the right wall, fitted with thin black steel frames, allows a sliver of soft, diffused daylight to cut through the volumetric shadows. In a corner beside the pantry, a tall, slender Fiddle Leaf Fig plant in a matte terracotta pot adds a touch of organic life, its deep green leaves contrasting with the earthy tones. The air is thick with rich dark tones, and the clean geometry of the modern design is rendered with immaculate precision, from the precise textures of the travertine to the seamless edges of the cabinetry, creating a hyper-realistic 3D architectural rendering.
